Name: Hydraulic Torrent
Deities: Apep , Hei Feng , Jin Li , Kelizandri , Matravash , Obari , Tresmalvos
Description:
A swirling torrent of water manifests along a straight line, battering creatures and unattended objects in its path and possibly
pushing
them away from you. The torrent deals 8d6 bludgeoning damage. Each creature in the area must attempt a basic Fortitude save; unattended objects automatically fail. Creatures and objects that fail are also knocked back 5 feet (10 feet on a critical failure).
